title: VanillaBack
description: A lightweight /back command that only teleports players to their last death location.
body:
# VanillaBack

This is a plugin that teleports players back to their last death with a simple /back command.

It is ideal for vanilla servers as this is its only function and does not have unnecessary bloat or confusion. It also works once a player has left and rejoined the server. It does not teleport to homes, tpa or other teleportations.
